_schema.description: Allowlist for B18 money math audit (scripts/audit-money-math.mjs). Each entry documents a known location where raw arithmetic on a money-typed value is acceptable. New entries require owner + expires + reason. Baseline entries (added on first audit run) expire 90 days out and must be migrated per docs/audits/MONEY_CENTS_AUDIT_2026-05-01.md.

fields.file: Path relative to repo root, e.g. src/lib/foo.ts
fields.line: 1-indexed line number where the violation occurs
fields.reason: Why this exception is acceptable; reference the migration plan if applicable
fields.expires: ISO date after which the entry no longer suppresses the violation

compactDollars() display helper — divides for compact K/M notation only; result is a formatted string, not a stored monetary value
PaymentMilestone.amount stored as USD dollars in this module (formatCurrency does not divide by 100); addCents would require schema migration — tracked in MONEY_CENTS_AUDIT_2026-05-01.md
billedAmount/totalAmount computes a dimensionless ratio [0.0–1.0] for UI progress bar; result is a percentage, not a monetary value; addCents/applyRateCents do not apply to ratio computation
paidAmount/totalAmount computes a dimensionless ratio [0.0–1.0] for UI progress bar; result is a percentage, not a monetary value; addCents/applyRateCents do not apply to ratio computation
Array.sort comparator — a.bid_amount - b.bid_amount produces a sign only (-/0/+) used for sort ordering; result is never stored or displayed as money
bid.bid_amount - low computes a delta that is immediately divided to produce a percentage variance for display; result is a dimensionless ratio, not a stored monetary value
Array.sort comparator — a.bid_amount - b.bid_amount produces a sign only (-/0/+) used for sort ordering; result is never stored or displayed as money

bid.bid_amount + adjustment computes adjusted total for display; stored bid amounts in this module use USD dollar units (non-cents schema per precon-enterprise.ts); addCents requires matching schema migration
poQty * poPrice computes line total for 3-way match display; unit_cost stored as USD dollars (formatCurrency does not divide by 100); multiplyCents requires Cents-typed schema migration
invoicedQty * invoicedPrice computes invoice line total for 3-way match display; stored as USD dollars (formatCurrency does not divide by 100); multiplyCents requires Cents-typed schema migration
poQty * poPrice computes line total for 3-way match table row display; stored as USD dollars; see L1077 allowlist entry
invoicedQty * invoicedPrice computes invoice total for 3-way match table row; stored as USD dollars; see L1078 allowlist entry
